scripts.capture:fixture: pnpm --filter @supplywatch/state build && TMPDIR=/tmp tsx src/worker.ts capture-fixture
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @supplywatch/state build && tsc -p tsconfig.json && pnpm --filter @supplywatch/dashboard build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @supplywatch/state build && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm --filter @supplywatch/dashboard typecheck
scripts.watcher:test: pnpm --filter @supplywatch/state build && vitest run tests src
scripts.dashboard:verify: concurrently -n typecheck,lint,build,test -c blue,magenta,green,yellow "pnpm dashboard:typecheck" "pnpm lint" "pnpm dashboard:build" "pnpm dashboard:test"
scripts.verify: concurrently -n typecheck,lint,build,test -c blue,magenta,green,yellow "pnpm typecheck" "pnpm lint" "pnpm build" "pnpm test"
scripts.watcher:verify: concurrently -n typecheck,lint,build,test -c blue,magenta,green,yellow "pnpm watcher:typecheck" "pnpm lint" "pnpm watcher:build" "pnpm watcher:test"
